description: COMP-3 even digit count: PIC S9(4) occupies 3 bytes ((4+1+1)/2), store and retrieve 4321
notes: PIC S9(4) COMP-3 = ceil((4+1)/2) = 3 bytes. Even digit count means the high nibble of the first byte is unused (zero-padded). Engine uses CobolDecimal (Decimal-based), so byte-level packing is abstracted. Value preserved correctly.
